nasb.text: Go and cry out to the gods which you have chosen; let them deliver you in the time of your distress.”

esv.text: Go and cry out to the gods whom you have chosen; let them save you in the time of your distress.”

cnv.text: 你們去向你們揀選的神呼求吧！讓他們在你們遭遇患難的時候拯救你們吧。”

ccb.text: 你们去呼求自己选择的神明吧！你们有难，让他们救你们吧！”
